reviews.comment:
Aqui aumentó antes del lunes la nafta. Buena atencion y limpieza

(Translated by Google)
Gas prices went up here before Monday. Good service and cleanliness.

reviews.comment:
El shop cierra a las 22. No hay baños despues de esa hora. El viajante tiene q recorrer otros tantos kilometros más para buscar baño.

(Translated by Google)
The shop closes at 10 p.m. There are no restrooms after that time. Travelers have to travel several more kilometers to find a restroom.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNDZHLWR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Sólo 2 bocas y el servicio es lento. Los combustibles son caros (en comparación a otras estaciones en ruta) y el baño es asqueroso. Pero es la única estación YPF y no les interesa ser mejor al parecer.

(Translated by Google)
There are only two pumps and the service is slow. Fuel is expensive (compared to other stations along the route) and the bathroom is disgusting. But it's the only YPF station and they don't seem to care about improving.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dFlyMFNREAE

reviews.comment:
